milestones.title: 🔧 Jason's Crypto Signals — FULL OG V0.000001 RESTORATION
milestones.changes: COMPLETE OG restoration (Feb 27 original). WhaleScanner top 50 by 24h volume. Threshold 75 (HIGH only). Cooldown 300s (5 min). Prices CoinGecko only (removed Binance live override). No direction filter. 6 scanners: Whale, DEX, Social, SmartMoney, Prediction, Price. Result: Pure OG behavior, 2 alerts per cycle on genuine HIGH conviction. All complexity stripped.
